title: Caldera - Exfiltration over C2 Channel via PowerShell (Windows)
description: Detects PowerShell-based HTTP POST exfiltration used by Caldera T1041 emulation. After staging data locally, the operation transmits collected files using Invoke-WebRequest or Invoke-RestMethod with -Method POST and -Body/-InFile parameters to send data back over the established C2 channel.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (( (('Command Line' like '*Invoke-WebRequest*' or 'Command Line' like '*Invoke-RestMethod*' or 'Command Line' like '*iwr *' or 'Command Line' like '*irm *')) and (('Command Line' like '*-Method POST*' or 'Command Line' like '*-Method Put*' or 'Command Line' like '*-Method "POST"*')) and (('Command Line' like '*-Body*' or 'Command Line' like '*-InFile*' or 'Command Line' like '*-UploadFile*')) ) or ('Process Name' like '*\\curl.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*-X POST*' or 'Command Line' like '*--upload-file*' or 'Command Line' like '*-d @*' or 'Command Line' like '*-T *')))
falsepositives: DevOps pipelines POSTing build results to CI systems
Application monitoring agents posting health data
